## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on blog content status and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Blocked:** 3 articles are ready but blocked by Sanity's inefficient table editor. Dhruv will fix this, and the articles will be published without tables today.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:** A new "Build, Launch, & Monetize" content cluster will be created, inspired by popular courses (e.g., Levels.io, AppMafia) to provide high-value, actionable guides for users.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [**Brand Consistency:** To maintain a unified brand, Dhruv will align the other agency on the GrowthX style guide (e.g., sentence case titles, consistent images) and share their content calendar to prevent topic overlap.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

## Topics

### Sanity Table Editor & Publishing Block

  - [**Problem:** The Sanity table editor is inefficient, requiring manual cell-by-cell creation.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [**Impact:** This blocks publishing 3 completed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Dhruv will fix the editor to enable copy-pasting tables.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [The 3 articles will be published today without tables.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### Content Pipeline & Reviews

  - [**Ready to Publish:** 3 articles (incl. "Lovable vs. v0") are ready, pending the table fix.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Ready for Review:** 4 articles are ready for Dhruv's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [**In Progress:** Nathalie will deliver 1 more article today and 5 new articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)

### Blog Content Strategy & Alignment

  - [**SEO Play:** The "Lovable vs. v0" comparison article is a pure SEO play to capture search traffic from users already researching competitor solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**New Content Cluster:** A "Build, Launch, & Monetize" cluster will be created, inspired by popular courses (e.g., Levels.io, AppMafia) to provide high-value, actionable guides for users.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [**Other Agency Alignment:**](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Issue:** The other agency's content violates the GrowthX style guide (e.g., using title case).](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Action:** Dhruv will align them on the style guide and share their content calendar to prevent topic overlap.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Article Indexing & Performance

  - [**Faster Indexing:** To speed up Google indexing, Nathalie will manually submit new articles via Search Console, and internal links will be added during publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**Performance Review:** A review of article performance will occur in 4–5 months.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Underperforming Content:** Will be refreshed and optimized.](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Content Pruning:** Removing articles is a long-term strategy (1–2 years).](https://fathom.video/share/kXgvo_cJxeRpLrr7_BXzB-SbMP_-HRrW?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
